acute_signals.snippet: When we look at some pre-clinical data, in corticosteroid or cortico-steroid-induced depression models, PE2228 at 3 micrograms per kilogram in mice shows significant improvements in both acute and sub-chronic protocols over four days. And then we also saw markers of new neuron formation and they approximately doubled in the treatment groups where the PE2228 analog showed particularly prominent neurogenesis effects. When we look at pharmacokinetic advantages and selectivity of PE2228 versus some of the more pharmaceutical drugs for depression as antidepressants.

2026-05-25 (older) — Hunter Williams, This Peptide Works 10X Faster Than SSRIs (Here's How) (2026-05-25, [this-peptide-works-10x-faster-than-ssris-heres-how--56c992c3 @ 10:27](https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/this-peptide-works-10x-faster-than-ssris-heres-how--56c992c3/)): "I do believe this one can be used as a nasal spray. "I think most people, if you don't feel anything at 250 micrograms, I'm usually pretty sensitive to nootropic compounds, but if don't feel nothing at 150 micro grams, you could probably go up to 500 micro-gram per day."
